functions.name: financefunctions.functions.cagr
documentation:
calculate cagr (compound annual growth rate) of a series.

Returns
-------
float
    float with cagr
CAGR function

functions.name: financefunctions.functions.momentum_value
documentation:
calculate momentum of the series with exponential regression.

Parameters
----------
series : pd.Series
    series to calculate momentum

Returns
-------
float
    momentum value for complete series
momentum value

methods.name: financefunctions.series.FinanceFunctionsSeries.vals_p
documentation:
return positive values of series

    drop Nan values, by default False

pandas dataframe

Values, StandardDeviations and Means

documentation:

documentation:
standard deviation of positive values

----------

    delta degrees of freedom, by default 1 ( standard param from used std-function )

float

methods.name: financefunctions.series.FinanceFunctionsSeries.sharp_ratio
documentation:
calculate sharpe ratio of a series.

    risk free rate, by default 0.03

Returns
-------
float
    float with volatility
sharpe ratio function

methods.name: financefunctions.series.FinanceFunctionsSeries.momentum
documentation:
calculate momentum of the series with exponential regression.

----------
period : int, optional
    period to calculate momentum, by default 90

pandas series
    momentum values for complete series
momentum value

methods.name: financefunctions.dataframes.FinanceFunctionsDataFrame.freq_factor
documentation:
get frequence factor value

Returns
-------
int
    frequence factor value to calculate annual returns

Raises
------
RuntimeError
    raise RuntimeError if frequence is unknown

documentation:
return subcolumn of dataframe

Parameters
----------
col : str
    column name

Returns
-------
pandas dataframe

columns functions

FinanceFunctionsDataFrame class provides additional functionality for
pandas dataframes. The class is registered as an accessor to the pandas
dataframe object.
